text: I am drawn into curiosity as I step from a white, sterile hallway into this vibrant, purposefully designed space dedicated to research and development. The juxtaposition of the clinical, almost impersonal exterior with the colorful, engaging exhibit inside invokes a sense of anticipation. I feel quietly exhilarated—this is a domain where knowledge is celebrated and explored, where questions bloom in the environment itself. The presence of text and digital displays invites reflection: knowledge is never static, always inviting participation.
